data.content_ref:
inline:# Design specification

This single-document website follows the adjudicated product plan. The harness assigned component identifiers and integration order; the following model-authored local values remain criticizable.

## Required-design synopsis
- Layout: one responsive scrolling page in order C1 → C2 → C3 → C4 → C5 → C6.
- Visual system: palette Cyber-Organic 2026: Deep Obsidian (#050A0C), Bioluminescent Green (#39FF14), Iridescent Purple (#B026FF), Cyan Glaze (#0; typography Headings: Geometric Sans-Serif (Inter or Montserrat) with wide tracking. Body: Monospace (JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono); spacing Fluid 8pt grid with exaggerated whitespace (padding: 2rem to 5rem) to create a gallery-like aether around data modules..
- Components: C1 Cyber-Organic header with the title 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life'; C2 Parallax-driven background layers for depth and visual atmosphere; C3 Nucleotide sequence data-grid for viewing base pairs; C4 Interactive transcription simulator with sequence scrubbing slider; C5 Visual guide explaining semi-conservative DNA replication; C6 Informational section for mRNA transcription and genetic factoids.
- Interaction and state: Bioluminescent Feedback: Hover states trigger a glow-bleed (box-shadow) and subtle scale-up (1.02x). Active states shift colors from Green to Cyan..
- Responsive behavior: Adaptive Columnar: 3-column data grid on desktop, collapsing to a single vertical stream on mobile with scaled-down typography and touch-optimized slider handles..
- Motion behavior: Organic Precision: Smooth, eased-out cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) transitions. Elements float with a low-frequency sine-wave oscillation to mimic fluid suspension..
- Reduced-motion behavior: Static-Positioning: All parallax offsets are neutralized to 0; oscillation is disabled; fade-ins are replaced by immediate visibility; sliders trigger instant state updates..
- Static alternative: Flat Data-Dashboard: Fixed layout with high-contrast borders; all interactive simulations are replaced by static side-by-side comparison diagrams and text descriptions..

## Page layout
One responsive scrolling page in this order: C1 → C2 → C3 → C4 → C5 → C6.

## Component inventory
- C1: Cyber-Organic header with the title 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life'. Requirements: Title text: 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life'; Cyber-Organic aesthetic styling; Bioluminescent Green and Cyan Glaze accents. Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C2: Parallax-driven background layers for depth and visual atmosphere. Requirements: Tri-Planar parallax layers (Background, Midground, Foreground); Bioluminescent Green and Iridescent Purple color accents; Glassmorphism and digital grain textures; Low-frequency sine-wave oscillation for floating elements. Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C3: Nucleotide sequence data-grid for viewing base pairs. Requirements: Base pair sequence data grid; Nucleotide labels (A, T, C, G); Bioluminescent feedback states; Monospace typography for sequences. Dependencies: none. Motion: limited.
- C4: Interactive transcription simulator with sequence scrubbing slider. Requirements: DNA sequence scrubbing slider; Real-time transcription visualization; Base pair to mRNA mapping display. Dependencies: C3. Motion: full.
- C5: Visual guide explaining semi-conservative DNA replication. Requirements: Visual demonstration of DNA double helix splitting; Illustration of parent strands serving as templates; Visual representation of new complementary strand synthesis; Labeling of semi-conservative mechanism. Dependencies: C2. Motion: full.
- C6: Informational section for mRNA transcription and genetic factoids. Requirements: mRNA transcription detailed explanation; Genetic factoids curated as data-points; Cyber-Organic 2026 visual styling. Dependencies: C2. Motion: full.

## Visual direction
- palette: Cyber-Organic 2026: Deep Obsidian (#050A0C), Bioluminescent Green (#39FF14), Iridescent Purple (#B026FF), Cyan Glaze (#00F3FF), and muted Slate Gray (#2D3436).
- typography: Headings: Geometric Sans-Serif (Inter or Montserrat) with wide tracking. Body: Monospace (JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono) for a data-centric, technical feel.
- spacing strategy: Fluid 8pt grid with exaggerated whitespace (padding: 2rem to 5rem) to create a gallery-like aether around data modules.
- responsive strategy: Adaptive Columnar: 3-column data grid on desktop, collapsing to a single vertical stream on mobile with scaled-down typography and touch-optimized slider handles.
- interaction state model: Bioluminescent Feedback: Hover states trigger a glow-bleed (box-shadow) and subtle scale-up (1.02x). Active states shift colors from Green to Cyan.
- motion language: Organic Precision: Smooth, eased-out cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) transitions. Elements float with a low-frequency sine-wave oscillation to mimic fluid suspension.
- scroll narrative: Layered Revelation: Content fades in via opacity and vertical translation as it enters the viewport, synced with a multi-speed parallax background.
- depth structure: Tri-Planar Parallax: Z-axis layering with Background (0.2x), Midground (0.5x), and Foreground (1.0x) translation relative to scroll position.
- transition grammar: Cross-fade and Slide: State changes occur via 300ms opacity blends and 400ms directional slides for sequence updates.
- texture language: Glassmorphism & Digital Grain: Frosted semi-transparent overlays (backdrop-filter: blur) combined with a subtle noise overlay to mimic a high-tech monitor.
- reduced motion version: Static-Positioning: All parallax offsets are neutralized to 0; oscillation is disabled; fade-ins are replaced by immediate visibility; sliders trigger instant state updates.
- static fallback: Flat Data-Dashboard: Fixed layout with high-contrast borders; all interactive simulations are replaced by static side-by-side comparison diagrams and text descriptions.

## Interaction, state, and responsive strategy
Each component owns its declared DOM root and lifecycle exports. The page is assembled in manifest order as one responsive local document. Motion follows the shared art direction; reduced-motion and static modes preserve the complete narrative without requiring animation or JavaScript-only content.

```manifest
{
  "architecture": "single-document",
  "art_direction": {
    "depth_structure": "Tri-Planar Parallax: Z-axis layering with Background (0.2x), Midground (0.5x), and Foreground (1.0x) translation relative to scroll position.",
    "motion_language": "Organic Precision: Smooth, eased-out cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) transitions. Elements float with a low-frequency sine-wave oscillation to mimic fluid suspension.",
    "reduced_motion_version": "Static-Positioning: All parallax offsets are neutralized to 0; oscillation is disabled; fade-ins are replaced by immediate visibility; sliders trigger instant state updates.",
    "scroll_narrative": "Layered Revelation: Content fades in via opacity and vertical translation as it enters the viewport, synced with a multi-speed parallax background.",
    "static_fallback": "Flat Data-Dashboard: Fixed layout with high-contrast borders; all interactive simulations are replaced by static side-by-side comparison diagrams and text descriptions.",
    "texture_language": "Glassmorphism & Digital Grain: Frosted semi-transparent overlays (backdrop-filter: blur) combined with a subtle noise overlay to mimic a high-tech monitor.",
    "transition_grammar": "Cross-fade and Slide: State changes occur via 300ms opacity blends and 400ms directional slides for sequence updates."
  },
  "components": [
    {
      "css_prefix": "c1-",
      "element_id": "header-root",
      "events_emitted": [],
      "events_listened": [],
      "js_exports": [
        "c1_updateHeaderGlow",
        "c1_mount",
        "c1_destroy"
      ],
      "js_uses": [],
      "libs": [],
      "lifecycle": {
        "animated": true,
        "cleanup": "c1_destroy",
        "context_loss": null,
        "frame_loop_owner": "component",
        "initializer": "c1_mount",
        "pixel_ratio_cap": null,
        "static_fallback": "Flat Data-Dashboard: Fixed layout with high-contrast borders; all interactive simulations are replaced by static side-by-side comparison diagrams and text descriptions.",
        "webgl_canvas_id": null
      },
      "max_chars": null,
      "name": "c1",
      "order": 0,
      "purpose": "Cyber-Organic header with the title 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life' Requirements: Title text: 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life'; Cyber-Organic aesthetic styling; Bioluminescent Green and Cyan Glaze accents",
      "runtime_imports": []
    },

  "dependencies": [],

  "title": "Create a single self-contained webpage about the wonders of DNA. Make it eye-catching, modern and artistic, with rich motion, parallax-like depth, animated scro"
```
